title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Dynamic Filtering, Sorting, and Multi-Chart Visualizations

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Dynamic Filtering, Sorting, and Multi-Chart Visualizations

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#090a0f`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><g transform='translate(100, 50)'><rect x='-20' y='-20' width='240' height='180' rx='20' fill='#090a0f'/><rect x='50' y='40' width='120' height='80' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='10' y='120' width='180' height='120' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><rect x='220' y='40' width='120' height='80' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/><g><path d='M 20,60 L 60,60 L 60,80 L 20,80 Z' fill='#C06C88'/><path d='M 70,60 L 110,60 L 110,80 L 70,80 Z' fill='#C06C88'/></g><g><path d='M 130,60 L 170,60 L 170,80 L 130,80 Z' fill='#C06C88'/><path d='M 190,60 L 230,60 L 230,80 L 190,80 Z' fill='#C06C88'/></g><text x='50' y='20' fill='#FFFFFF' font-family='Arial' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>Real-Time Analytics</text><text x='210' y='20' fill='#FFFFFF' font-family='Arial' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>Filters</text><text x='25' y='110' fill='#FFFFFF' font-family='Arial' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>Data Table</text><text x='235' y='110' fill='#FFFFFF' font-family='Arial' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>Map View</text><text x='45' y='145' fill='#FFFFFF' font-family='Arial' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>Sort by</text><text x='230' y='145' fill='#FFFFFF' font-family='Arial' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>Toggle Map View</text></g><g transform='translate(100, 250)'><rect x='10' y='10' width='180' height='80' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='40' y='35' fill='#FFFFFF' font-family='Arial' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>Select Filter</text><g><rect x='20' y='60' width='80' height='40' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='50' y='70' fill='#FFFFFF' font-family='Arial' font-size='12' text-anchor='middle'>Filter 1</text></g><g><rect x='110' y='60' width='80' height='40' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='140' y='70' fill='#FFFFFF' font-family='Arial' font-size='12' text-anchor='middle'>Filter 2</text></g></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use only specified colors and layout elements
Must be fully interactive with dynamic filtering, sorting, and state updates
Must include multiple chart visualizations with real-time data

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard with Dynamic Filtering, Sorting, and Multi-Chart Visualizations

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify dynamic filtering, sorting, and state updates, as well as multiple chart visualizations.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
